name: The Big Three
description:
|| 1-A meets The Big Three! — The Big...Four? || Mirio, Tamaki, Nejire, and you go into class 1-A to both meet the younger years and tell them about your work studies ||
|| You aren't technically a part of The Big Three, but you are still great friends with them and have the same reputation for being rather powerful ||


|| MHA / My Hero Academia - BNHA / Baku No Hero Academia ||
|| Pt. 1 ||
creator: DragonEatN0odleFun
